SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Activity
Represents a tracked application activity with duration.
AiAPI
Integration with Google Generative AI (Gemini) for session analysis.
AiAPI.WrappedData
Structured data returned by AI session analysis.
AuthService
Service for handling user authentication logic.
AuthService.AuthResult
Result of an authentication operation (login or registration).
AuthService.Status
Status codes for authentication operations.
AuthService.UserGateway
Gateway interface for user data operations.
DashboardController
Controller for the dashboard view.
DashboardView
View class for the dashboard scene.
DatabaseManager
Manager for all database operations.
HistoryController
 
HistoryFormatter
Utility class for formatting session data for display.
HistoryStore
In-memory storage for study session history.
HistoryView
View class for the history scene.
LoginController
Controller for the login view.
Main
Entry point for the StudySlice JavaFX application.
RegisterController
Controller for the registration view.
SessionHistoryEntry
Represents a complete saved study session.
SessionSaveService
Service for preparing session data before database persistence.
SessionSaveService.PrepareResult
Result of a session preparation operation.
SessionSaveService.SaveRequest
Request containing validated session data ready for persistence.
SessionSaveService.Status
Status codes for session preparation operations.
StudyController
Controller for the study view.
TimerController
 
TimerView
View class for the timer scene.
TrackingEngine
Core engine that tracks study sessions in real-time.
User
Manages the currently logged-in user's session information.
ViewController
Base navigation controller for switching between main application views.
ViewManager
Manager for switching between JavaFX scenes.
WrappedBadHabitController
Controller for the wrapped bad habit page.
WrappedComparisonController
Controller for the wrapped comparison page.
WrappedDataHolder
Static singleton that carries WrappedData and the originating session across scene switches in the Wrapped animation sequence.
WrappedFocusScoreController
Controller for the wrapped focus score page.
WrappedGoodHabitController
Controller for the wrapped good habit page.
WrappedRankingController
Controller for the wrapped ranking page.
WrappedStreakController
Controller for the wrapped streak page.
WrappedTopAppController
Controller for the wrapped top application page.
WrapperController
Controller for the wrapped feature introduction page.
WrapperTotalTimeController
Controller for the wrapped total study time page.
